doctrine: A product exists when a stranger can name it, see a price, and reach a checkout. Anything less is an artifact.

products.name: Epic Fury 2026
products.what_it_is: Conflict-intelligence platform. Live OSINT feeds AND the Operation Epic Fury simulated scenario, with every dashboard labelled LIVE / SIMULATION / MIXED so an analyst never has to guess which they are reading.
products.buyer: Geopolitical/defense analysts, risk desks, journalists, wargamers
products.rung_note: Real livemode charge $20.52 (sub active); net $18.10 held by Stripe, PENDING until 2026-07-21. Promotes to 5_EARNING automatically when the balance transaction settles — verified against the account, not asserted.
products.app_store_distribution_source: FOUNDER_ATTESTED 2026-07-16 — Michael reports App Store Connect shows 'Epic Fury 2026 ready for distribution' (Apple review PASSED via console submission). API-key submission path RETIRED; do not re-initiate ASC API-key regeneration.

products.name: Runway — Monthly Cash-Flow & Tax-Prep Packet
products.what_it_is: An automated monthly packet for solo operators: a 30/60/90-day cash-flow snapshot, a categorized transaction rollup, an estimated-quarterly-tax worksheet, and a year-end 1099-candidate list, assembled into a clean handoff for the user's own accountant. Organizational tooling only — explicitly NOT financial, investment, or tax advice.
products.buyer: Solo founders, freelancers, and single-member LLCs with no bookkeeper who hand raw statements to a CPA once a quarter.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no checkout built yet; product defined only
products.rung_note: NO FAKE GREEN: this is a product DEFINITION (name + price) only. HFF has not yet produced a validated artifact, has no checkout, and has earned $0. Defined != produced != sellable. First-mission spec staged at docs/factories/products/HFF_runway.md; dispatch only after the active soak seals.
products.guardrail: no financial/tax/investment advice — packets and tooling only

products.name: HOCH Cue Library — Cleared Instrumental Cues for Creators
products.what_it_is: Original instrumental music cues (loops, stings, beds, transitions) produced by the music factory and license-cleared for use in video, podcasts, and indie games. Instrumental-first by policy: no vocals and no artist- or voice-likeness. Delivered as themed cue packs with an attached usage license.
products.buyer: Video creators, podcasters, and indie game devs who need cheap, license-clean background music without a per-track marketplace hunt.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no checkout built yet; product defined only
products.rung_note: NO FAKE GREEN: product DEFINITION (name + price) only. HMF has not yet produced a validated cue pack, has no checkout, and has earned $0. First-mission spec staged at docs/factories/products/HMF_cue_library.md; dispatch only after the active soak seals. License-gate is a hard requirement before any pack ships.

products.name: Story Studio — One-Story Export
products.what_it_is: A web app (hsf/story-studio-v2.html + hsf/story-engine.js) that lets anyone build an animated storybook in-browser for free, then pay to export a watermark-free, permanently-hosted copy. Two tiers: a $19 one-time single-story export ('onestory') and a $12/mo Creators subscription that unlocks unlimited exports. Payment loop is a deploy scaffold at hsf/deploy/ (Stripe Checkout / Payment Link + signed webhook).
products.buyer: Parents, teachers, and hobbyist creators who want a finished shareable animated storybook without design tools; Creators tier for people making them repeatedly.
products.entitlement_source: signed Stripe webhook (checkout.session.completed) -> Vercel KV via hsf/deploy/lib/store.js (store lib IMPLEMENTED 2026-07-16; @vercel/kv when env present, in-memory fallback otherwise)

products.name: Invoice Aging Snapshot
products.what_it_is: Upload an AR/invoice CSV -> a clean 30/60/90 aging report (Current, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+) + a who-owes-what-by-customer summary, delivered as an XLSX workbook and a one-page PDF. Deterministic engine; unparseable rows are flagged, not dropped. Organizational tooling only.
products.buyer: Freelancers and small shops chasing unpaid invoices without accounting software.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no live Stripe account/price/keys and no deploy yet; code-complete at products/hff-invoice-aging/. Founder go-live only.

products.tests: 48 engine assertions + 10 mocked buy-loop tests, all pass (node v22). Advice linter fails-closed; webhook rejects bad signature (400) and is inert without keys (501).
products.real_vs_stub: REAL: aging engine, XLSX+PDF render, advice linter, validation gate, checkout/webhook/entitlement code, landing+delivery UI. STUB: no live Stripe account/price/keys, no deploy; buy-loop tests MOCK stripe and run store in-memory.

Inert (501) until keys set.

products.name: Link & QR Safety Report
products.what_it_is: Paste a URL (or a decoded QR payload) -> an OFFLINE heuristic safety report: static redirect-chain extraction, punycode/homoglyph look-alike detection, ~16 known-bad URL patterns (raw-IP host, credential/@ trick, brand look-alikes, abused TLDs, shorteners with unresolved destination, risky download extensions), TLS surface from the URL, and a LOW/ELEVATED/HIGH concern band. Heuristic only, clearly disclaimed — never a guarantee.
products.buyer: Cautious consumers and small-biz owners vetting a link before clicking.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no live Stripe account/price/keys and no deploy yet; code-complete at products/hcf-phish-checker/. Founder go-live only.
products.entitlement_source: signed Stripe webhook (checkout.session.completed) -> per-session entitlement (sess:<id>) via lib/store.js (@vercel/kv when env present, in-memory fallback otherwise)
products.tests: 21 engine assertions + 10 mocked buy-loop tests, all pass (node v22, no install, no network). Report-linter fails-closed on any certainty over-claim; webhook rejects bad signature (400) and is inert without keys (501).
products.real_vs_stub: REAL: offline heuristic engine (url parse, homoglyph/punycode, ~16 checks, static redirect chain, scoring), certainty-guardrail report-linter, checkout/webhook/entitlement/gated delivery, landing+delivery UI. STUB: QR image pixel-decode is client-side (engine analyzes the already-decoded payload; it never fabricates a decode); no live Stripe account/price/keys, no deploy; no network reputation feeds (offline by design); buy-loop tests MOCK stripe and run store in-memory.
products.rung_note: NO FAKE GREEN. Code-complete to the doorstep and fully tested. $0 earned, no checkout live. Founder deploy remains: create a $5 one-time Stripe price, set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY / STRIPE_PRICE_REPORT / STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET / BASE_URL (+ optional Vercel KV), then deploy via scripts/factory_deploy.sh. Inert (501) until keys set.
products.guardrail: heuristic only; never claim certainty; no real-world security decision advice (enforced by fail-closed report-linter + mandatory disclaimer)

products.name: Compliance Change Digest
products.what_it_is: Given the regulatory/source documents you provide -> a cited, plain-English digest of what changed, who it affects, and an explicit 'what we're uncertain about' section. Citation-per-claim is enforced by a fail-closed linter: an uncited claim, a citation to a non-existent source, or a quote not found verbatim in its source all block the digest from rendering. Reuses the proven hrf-clarity-briefs citation-linter pattern (ported to Node).
products.buyer: Small compliance/ops teams tracking rule changes without a research staff.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no live Stripe account/price/keys and no deploy yet; code-complete at products/hrf-compliance-digest/. Founder go-live only.
products.entitlement_source: signed Stripe webhook (checkout.session.completed / subscription.updated/deleted) -> email-keyed subscription entitlement via lib/store.js (@vercel/kv when env present, in-memory fallback otherwise)
products.tests: 11 engine assertions (citation-coverage linter: coverage, unresolved-source, ungrounded-quote/anti-fabrication, empty-uncertainty, missing-disclaimer, partial-coverage) + 10 mocked buy-loop tests, all pass (node v22, no install, no network).
products.real_vs_stub: REAL: citation-coverage linter (fail-closed, verbatim quote-grounding), digest assembler, auto-uncertainty seeding, markdown renderer with inline footnotes, subscription checkout/webhook/entitlement/gated generation, landing+generation UI. STUB/by-design: deterministic floor only (verbatim grounding proves a quote was present, not that it semantically supports the claim — LLM council pass is a documented, unwired integration point); customer supplies sources + drafted changes (no crawler); no live Stripe account/price/keys, no deploy; buy-loop tests MOCK stripe and run store in-memory.
products.rung_note: NO FAKE GREEN. Code-complete to the doorstep and fully tested. $0 earned, no checkout live. Founder deploy remains: create a $12/mo Stripe price, set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY / STRIPE_PRICE_MONTHLY / STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET / BASE_URL (+ optional Vercel KV), then deploy via scripts/factory_deploy.sh. Inert (501) until keys set.
products.guardrail: information not legal advice; every claim cited; uncertainty section mandatory (all enforced by the fail-closed linter)

products.name: Podcast Intro & Transition Sting Pack
products.what_it_is: Themed packs of short INSTRUMENTAL stings/transitions (intros, outros, bumpers, segment breaks) with an attached usage license. Buy a pack -> license-gated ZIP with the audio, a generated LICENSE.txt (derived from the pack's structured terms), and a manifest.json. Reuses the proven hmf-cue-library store/license-gate pattern, adapted to $9 one-time per-pack.
products.buyer: Independent podcasters needing cheap, license-clean audio furniture.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no license-cleared audio loaded (placeholder catalog, available:false) AND no live Stripe account/price/keys and no deploy yet; code-complete at products/hmf-podcast-stings/. Founder go-live only.

products.real_vs_stub: REAL: catalog load/validate/preview, per-pack license-gate + instrumental-only policy gate, license generation, dependency-free ZIP packager, checkout/webhook/entitlement/gated delivery, storefront+delivery UI. products.name: Coloring Book Export
products.what_it_is: Turn a Story Studio story into a printable line-art coloring book PDF: cover + one deterministic vector drawing per scene (outlined colorable headings, read-aloud caption) + a 'colored by' certificate back page. Free preview is ALWAYS watermarked; $7 one-time unlocks watermark-free export for that story session. Child-safe by design (fail-closed safety gate).
products.buyer: Parents and teachers wanting a printable activity from a story.
products.checkout_blocked_by: no live Stripe account/price/keys and no deploy yet; code-complete at products/hsf-coloring-export/. Founder go-live only.

Only a founder deploy remains: create a $7 one-time Stripe price, set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY / STRIPE_PRICE_EXPORT / STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET / BASE_URL (+ optional Vercel KV) in Vercel env, then deploy via scripts/factory_deploy.sh. Inert (501) on paid paths until keys set; free preview stays watermarked always.
